title: verbascum × pterocaulon
intro: Verbascum × pterocaulon, also known as Mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family, characterized by its large, velvety leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × pterocaulon include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, salves, and ointments, making it a versatile and effective remedy for a range of health issues.
